basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bhubaneswar (AIIMS Bhubaneswar) Project Technical Support-III Notification 2026 has been released on the official website aiimsbhubaneswar.nic.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Bhubaneswar Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation is admissible in respect of SC/ST/OBC/PWD candidates as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Three years degree in Life Sciences + Three years post qualification experience OR PG in Life Sciences /Public health

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bhubaneswar Project Technical Support-III Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Bhubaneswar Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Bhubaneswar Project Technical Support-III Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bhubaneswar Project Technical Support-III Salary 2026
AIIMS Bhubaneswar Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
AIIMS Bhubaneswar Project Technical Support-III Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Bhubaneswar Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bhubaneswar Project Technical Support-III Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the AIIMS Bhubaneswar recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the AIIMS Bhubaneswar recruitment is Project Technical Support-III. This is a contractual position announced through a walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Technical Support-III post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Technical Support-III post at AIIMS Bhubaneswar. This is a single opening announced for this specific role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in, and the interview is scheduled for 23 July 2026. There is no separate last date for submission of application forms as candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for Project Technical Support-III?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a three years degree in Life Sciences along with three years of post-qualification experience, or a PG degree in Life Sciences/Public Health to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Project Technical Support-III position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Technical Support-III position is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PWD candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support-III post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Technical Support-III post will receive a salary of Rs. 28000 Per Month, plus HRA as admissible.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this AIIMS Bhubaneswar recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Technical Support-III recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Technical Support-III recruitment involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification. Candidates need to perform well in both stages.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview for AIIMS Bhubaneswar recruitment going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bhubaneswar, Odisha, 751019. Candidates must reach the venue on the specified date and time.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and category certificates (if applicable), along with recent passport-size photographs.
